mechanism_narrative: Strong monthly payroll growth (PAYEMS) signals robust labor market conditions that boost consumer spending and corporate earnings, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of periods with PAYEMS growth > 100k, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly unemployment rate (UNRATE) above 7.5% indicates slack in the labor market, reducing consumer confidence and corporate profit margins, which predicts negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite UNRATE > 7.5%, or t-test p-value > 0.05 for return differences.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in inflation (CPIAUCSL) and federal funds rate (FEDFUNDS) signal monetary tightening amid rising price pressures, creating headwinds for equity valuations and predicting negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of periods with CPIAUCSL > 2.5% and FEDFUNDS > 2.0%, or interaction effect IC < 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Monetary tightening cycles, indicated by rising federal funds rates (FEDFUNDS), compress equity valuations through higher discount rates, predicting negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of periods with FEDFUNDS increases, or t-test p-value > 0.05 for return differences.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production (INDPRO) reflects robust corporate activity and capacity utilization, driving earnings growth and predicting positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of periods with INDPRO growth > 1.0%, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts (HOUST) indicate elevated demand for residential construction, boosting related sectors and predicting positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of periods with HOUST growth > 5.0%, or t-test p-value > 0.05 for return differences.

mechanism_narrative: Positive demand-side momentum, reflected in rising retail sales (RSAFS) and industrial production (INDPRO), signals strong economic activity that drives corporate earnings and predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of periods with RSAFS > 0.5% and INDPRO > 0.3%, or interaction effect IC < 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Strong quarterly GDP growth (GDPC1) indicates robust macroeconomic expansion, which drives corporate profits and predicts positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of periods with GDPC1 growth > 2.0%, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.
